next_action: use these local stop rules only to pause work; do not claim capacity, schedule, skill, team, hiring, delegation, coverage, authority, or deployment readiness
stop_rule_scope: public-safe local stop rules for pausing solo work before scope expansion, private-detail recording, failed validation, external action, money or legal action, support promises, or deployment pressure

stop_rules.public_safe_note: Pause when one small task expands into many tasks; return to the next-action boundary.
Pause before recording private schedule, private health, account, secret, legal, financial, customer, or support details.
Pause when a validator, test, or expected-output check fails; keep the result local until fixed.
Pause before using external accounts, contacting people, publishing, or crossing a repository boundary.
Pause before spending, payment setup, company action, patent action, legal claim, or financial authority claim.
Pause before claiming customer support, incident coverage, operator coverage, production operation, or deployment readiness.
